workout.finisher: Incline walk · 10 min · 3.4 mph · 6-8% incline (skip if session hits 65 min)

exercises.name: Flat DB Bench Press
exercises.note: New working weight at 65. Controlled 2-sec eccentric, full range. Monitor left shoulder — if anything feels off, drop to 60.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.note: Flat bench today means no stacking concern with the shoulder. Hold at 35 until left shoulder is fully clear.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.note: Rotating from T-bar row. Drive elbows straight back, full stretch at the catch. If all 3 sets are clean, flag it — next session bumps to 140 (machine goes 120→135→150).

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Shoulder health staple — don't skip. Elbows high and wide, pull to forehead level, squeeze rear delts at the end. Last done May 11.

exercises.name: Rear Delt Fly (cable or DB)
exercises.note: Swapping lateral raises today for rear delt variety. Lead with elbows back and wide, squeeze at the top, avoid shrugging.

exercises.name: Arms Superset: Rope Pushdown + Incline DB Curl
exercises.detail: Rope pushdown 80 lb × 12 + Incline DB curl 20 lb × 10 · 3 rounds
exercises.note: Incline curls hit the full stretch on the bicep — arms hang behind the body at the bottom. Keep the weight at 20 lb and focus on the range of motion, not the load. Elbows pinned on the pushdown, full extension at the bottom.

exercises.name: Core Circuit B
exercises.detail: Pallof Press 40 lb × 10/side + Ab Wheel × 8-10 + Bird Dog × 8/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: Rotating from Monday's Circuit C. Pallof press: stay tall, resist rotation. Ab wheel: only extend as far as your lower back stays flat. Bird dog: pause 1 sec at the top of each rep.
